rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly addresses logical consistency by restructuring arguments, removing vague claims, and clearly defining terms like the reliability curve.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty is addressed but lacks specific prior work references, only generally mentioning previous studies without detailed comparison.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is well-disclosed with clear flags on assumptions and missing information.
rationale.RX.3: Output adheres strictly to the requested scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; actually identifies issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are traced but minor edits lack annotation.
